"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion2024.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\infoexchangerproject.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\JetBrains\CLion2024.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\infoexchangerproject.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\infoexchangerproject.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\JetBrains\CLion2024.3\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\infoexchangerproject.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o infoexchangerproject\binaries\infoexchangerproject.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libinfoexchangerproject.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\infoexchangerproject.dir\linkLibs.rsp
